## What type of change is this?

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes (or noted why not)
- [ ] `pnpm web:build` succeeds (for web changes)
- [ ] Manual smoke check done where relevant (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md))
